package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for duplicate_struct_tag_key: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Struct field tags that repeat the same key more than once.
type CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyModel
}

type CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyService struct {
    repo *CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDuplicateStructTagKey(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDuplicateStructTagKeyDTO) error {
    focus := "duplicate_struct_tag_key"
    _ = focus
    type CleanTag struct { ID string `json:"id" db:"id"` }
    _ = CleanTag{}
    duplicate_struct_tag_key_negative := map[string]int{"duplicate": 1, "struct": 2, "tag": 3, "key": 4}
    duplicate_struct_tag_key_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    duplicate_negative_0 := duplicate_struct_tag_key_negative["duplicate"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicate_negative_0
    struct_negative_1 := duplicate_struct_tag_key_negative["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_negative_1
    tag_negative_2 := duplicate_struct_tag_key_negative["tag"] + len(input)
    _ = tag_negative_2
    key_negative_3 := duplicate_struct_tag_key_negative["key"] + len(input)
    _ = key_negative_3
    return nil
}
